name: OneDrive
description: OneDrive is Microsoft's cloud storage service, accessed through the Microsoft Graph API. It lets you upload, download, organize, search, and share files and folders across OneDrive personal, OneDrive for Business, and SharePoint document libraries.

capabilities.name: drives_get
capabilities.description: Get the current user's default drive.

capabilities.name: drives_list
capabilities.description: List all drives available to the current user.

capabilities.name: drives_get_by_id
capabilities.description: Get a specific drive by its ID.

capabilities.name: items_get
capabilities.description: Get a DriveItem resource by ID.

capabilities.name: items_get_by_path
capabilities.description: Get a DriveItem by its path relative to the root.

capabilities.name: items_list_children
capabilities.description: List all files and subfolders within a folder.

capabilities.name: items_list_children_by_path
capabilities.description: List children of a folder by its path.

capabilities.name: items_create_folder
capabilities.description: Create a new folder inside an existing folder.

capabilities.name: items_upload_small
capabilities.description: Upload a file up to 4 MB using simple upload.

capabilities.name: items_upload_create_session
capabilities.description: Create an upload session for large files (over 4 MB).

capabilities.name: items_download
capabilities.description: Download the content of a file.

capabilities.name: items_update
capabilities.description: Update a DriveItem's metadata (rename, move, etc.).

capabilities.name: items_delete
capabilities.description: Delete a DriveItem (move to recycle bin).

capabilities.name: items_copy
capabilities.description: Create a copy of a DriveItem (including folder contents).

capabilities.name: items_move
capabilities.description: Move a DriveItem to a new parent folder.

capabilities.name: items_search
capabilities.description: Search for files and folders by name or content.

capabilities.name: items_create_sharing_link
capabilities.description: Create a sharing link for a file or folder.

capabilities.name: permissions_list
capabilities.description: List permissions on a DriveItem.

capabilities.name: permissions_get
capabilities.description: Get a specific permission on a DriveItem.

capabilities.name: permissions_update
capabilities.description: Update a permission on a DriveItem.

capabilities.name: permissions_delete
capabilities.description: Remove a permission from a DriveItem.

capabilities.name: permissions_invite
capabilities.description: Send a sharing invitation for a DriveItem.

capabilities.name: thumbnails_list
capabilities.description: Get thumbnails for a DriveItem.

capabilities.name: items_delta
capabilities.description: Track changes to files and folders since the last sync.

capabilities.name: special_folders_get
capabilities.description: Get a special folder by name (e.g. documents, photos, music).

capabilities.name: shared_with_me_list
capabilities.description: List items shared with the current user.

capabilities.name: recent_list
capabilities.description: List recently accessed files.
